tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Call Me chords
Blondie  1980 *

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Call_Me_(Blondie_song)

Capo I

[ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]  2x

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
Color me your color, baby,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
color me your car.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
Color me your color, darling,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
I know who you are.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
Come up off your color chart;[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]
I know where you're coming from.[/tab]

[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]
Call me (call me) on the line,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Gm[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]
call me, call me any, anytime.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]
Call me (call me) I'll arrive, [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Gm[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]
you can call me any day or night.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]   
Call me![/tab]

[ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]  

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
Cover me with kisses, baby,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
cover me with love.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
Roll me in designer sheets,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
I'll never get enough.[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Gm[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
Emotions come, I don't know why;[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
cover up love's alibi.[/tab]

[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]
Call me (call me) on the line,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Gm[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]
call me, call me any, anytime.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]
Call me (call me) I'll arrive, [/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Gm[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]
when you're ready we can share the wine.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]
Call me.[/tab]

[ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]Bm[/ch]
Ooh, he speaks the languages of love.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Bm[/ch]
Ooh, amore, chiamami (chiamami).[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
Ooh, appelle-moi, mon cheri (appelle-moi).[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Dm[/ch]                           [ch]Bb[/ch]
Anytime, anyplace, anywhere, anyway![/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Gm[/ch]                                    [ch]A[/ch]
Anytime, anyplace, anywhere, any day, anyway![/tab]

[ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]

[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]
Call me (call me) in my life,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Gm[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]
call me, call me any, anytime.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]                [ch]F[/ch]
Call me (call me) I'll arrive,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Gm[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch]
call me, call me for some overtime.[/tab]

[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]
Call me (call me) in my life,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Gm[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]
call me, call me in a sweet design.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]Gm[/ch]              [ch]Bb[/ch]
Call me, (call me) call me for your lover's lover's alibi.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
Call me (call me) inner line,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Gm[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]
call me, call me any anytime.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]
Call me.[/tab]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]        [ch]Gm[/ch]      [ch]Bb[/ch]
Oh, call me, ooh ooh ah.[/tab]

* Alternate:

Capo IV

[ch]Dm[/ch] = [ch]Bm[/ch]
[ch]Bb[/ch] = [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]F[/ch]  = [ch]D[/ch]
[ch]G[/ch]  = [ch]E[/ch]
[ch]Gm[/ch] = [ch]Em[/ch]
[ch]A[/ch]  = [ch]F#[/ch]
[ch]Em[/ch] = [ch]C#m[/ch]
[ch]Bm[/ch] = [ch]G#m[/ch]

Set8
